Name: Avocado Toast
Ingredients: Whole Wheat Bread: 2 slices | Avocado: 150g | Lemon Juice: 5g | Salt: 1g
Steps: Toast the bread until golden.;Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt.;Spread avocado on toast and serve.

Name: Salmon & Rice Bowl
Ingredients: Salmon Fillet: 170g | White Rice Cooked: 186g | Broccoli Raw: 91g | Soy Sauce: 15g
Steps: Season salmon with soy sauce and let marinate 10 min.;Cook rice as per packet.;Pan-fry salmon 4 min each side until cooked through.;Steam broccoli 3 min.;Assemble bowl and serve.

Name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
Steps: Layer yogurt in a glass.;Slice banana and add on top.;Sprinkle granola and drizzle honey.;Serve immediately.

Name: Lentil Soup
Ingredients: Lentils Cooked: 396g | Carrot: 100g | Onion: 80g | Garlic: 10g | Olive Oil: 14g | Cumin: 3g
Steps: Sauté diced onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.;Add diced carrot and cook 3 min.;Add lentils and enough water to cover.;Season with cumin, salt and pepper.;Simmer 20 min then blend half for a thicker soup.

Name: Almond Butter Smoothie
Ingredients: Almond Butter: 32g | Banana: 100g | Whole Milk: 244g | Spinach: 30g | Honey: 10g
Steps: Add all ingredients to a blender.;Blend on high for 60 seconds until smooth.;Pour and serve immediately.

Name: Cheesy Broccoli Bake
Ingredients: Broccoli Raw: 300g | Cheddar Cheese: 113g | Whole Milk: 120g | Garlic: 5g | Flour: 15g
Steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.;Steam broccoli 4 min then place in baking dish.;Make cheese sauce: melt flour in milk, stir in grated cheddar until smooth.;Pour sauce over broccoli.;Bake 20 min until golden and bubbling.

Name: Sweet Potato & Lentil Curry
Ingredients: Sweet Potato: 260g | Lentils Cooked: 198g | Coconut Milk: 100g | Onion: 80g | Curry Powder: 5g
Steps: Dice sweet potato into 2cm cubes.;Sauté onion until golden, add curry powder and toast 1 min.;Add sweet potato and 200ml water, simmer 15 min.;Stir in lentils and coconut milk.;Cook 5 more min and season to taste.

Name: Salmon Omelette
Ingredients: Salmon Fillet: 85g | Eggs: 2 | Cheddar Cheese: 28g | Spinach: 20g | Butter: 5g
Steps: Flake cooked salmon into pieces.;Whisk eggs with a pinch of salt.;Melt butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.;Pour in eggs, add salmon and spinach.;Fold and top with grated cheddar, cook until set.

Name: Overnight Oats
Ingredients: Rolled Oats: 80g | Whole Milk: 180g | Greek Yogurt: 60g | Almond Butter: 16g | Chia Seeds: 10g
Steps: Combine oats, milk, yogurt and almond butter in a jar.;Stir in chia seeds.;Seal and refrigerate overnight (at least 6 hours).;Top with fruit before serving.

Name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
Ingredients: Broccoli Raw: 400g | Cheddar Cheese: 113g | Whole Milk: 360g | Onion: 60g | Butter: 14g | Flour: 20g
Steps: Sauté diced onion in butter until soft.;Whisk in flour and cook 1 min.;Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.;Add chopped broccoli and simmer 15 min.;Stir in grated cheddar until melted, season and serve.
